title: rubus × strigatus
intro: Rubus × strigatus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or black raspberry, is a type of plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus occidentalis. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × strigatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially preventing certain types of cancer, as well as supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, and its leaves and fruit can also be used fresh or dried in various herbal preparations.
